title: Tree Store Contract
description: Validates the _contract.json file for a Tree store. A Tree holds hierarchical nodes with single-parent constraint (acyclic).

node_schema.description: JSON Schema for a single node. Must declare a parent reference field.

parent_field.description: Field name on the node that references its parent. Null = root.

max_branching.description: Optional cap on children per node.

ordered.description: If true, siblings have explicit ordering (via an order field).
